hero.title: Your trusted supplier,
hero.subtitle: We distribute quality products for restaurants with the best customer service. Timely deliveries, transparent pricing and a commercial relationship that lasts.

features.title: Why choose BOOD SUPPLY?
features.subtitle: We build lasting commercial relationships based on fair pricing, quality and exceptional service.
features.f1_desc: Full transparency in every order. No surprises, no hidden costs. The price you see is the price you pay.
features.f2_desc: We carefully select every product so your restaurant receives exactly what it needs.
features.f3_desc: Dedicated team available to resolve any issue quickly and professionally.
features.f4_desc: Optimized routes and efficient logistics so your products arrive on time.
